plugin_desc: Waystream ASR / FTTH switch SNMP child template (IANA PEN 9303). The verified WAYSTREAM-SMI and WAYSTREAM-RPM-MIB private tree is focused on enterprise identity and RPM/IPTV QoS objects, and no row-filter-free scalar device-health gauges were confirmed in the available state. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Switch SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/switch metric model while this plugin provides the Waystream collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power-supply state are not collected (N/A). Supported brands/models — Waystream ASR and FTTH access switches.
name: Switch

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
